execution_boundary.summary: Management-system controls govern organizational process rather than direct runtime execution.

preparation_boundary.summary: Management controls can define preparation, review, and approval processes.

commitment_boundary.summary: Management-system obligations can become policy references for commit-time review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Control mapping is required before semantic-equivalent tool paths can be compared.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown operations should be governed by documented management processes and escalation.

authority_boundary.summary: Management standard alignment does not grant StegVerse authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Current management records, scope, and controls are required for standing review.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Audit and management records can support reconstruction when preserved.

interoperability_path.summary: ISO/IEC 42001 maps into policy, control, authority, and evidence dimensions.

next_required_action: add ISO/IEC 42001 management-control fixture for authority and policy dimensions
